bid_awarded.title: Your bid was awarded
bid_awarded.body: You won {{reference}}. Order {{orderReference}} is now open.

dispatched.title: Order dispatched
dispatched.body: {{cargo}} is on its way. Share your delivery OTP with the driver on arrival.

load_assigned.title: New load assigned
load_assigned.body: Pick up {{cargo}} from {{fromCity}} — ask the seller for the pickup OTP.

delivered_seller.title: Delivered
delivered_seller.body: Order {{reference}} was delivered. You can now raise an invoice.

payout_requested.title: Payout requested
payout_requested.body: Your withdrawal request for {{amount}} was received and is under review.

payout_approved.title: Payout sent
payout_approved.body: Your withdrawal of {{amount}} has been approved and paid out.

outbid.title: You've been outbid
outbid.body: Someone placed a higher bid on “{{product}}”. The current top bid is {{amount}}.

won.title: You won the auction
won.body: Your {{amount}} bid won “{{product}}”. Complete your order to secure it.

sold.title: Your auction sold
sold.body: “{{product}}” closed at {{amount}} — {{buyer}} is the winning buyer.

awarded.title: You won a buyer bid
awarded.body: Your bid on {{reference}} was awarded. Order {{orderReference}} is open.

cancelled.title: Hire cancelled
cancelled.body: {{actor}} cancelled the hire {{reference}}. Any held funds were refunded.

assigned.title: You've been assigned a job
assigned.body: You were assigned to loading job {{reference}}.

quote_new.title: New transport quote
quote_new.body: A transporter quoted {{amount}} on your request.

assigned.title: Trip assigned
assigned.body: Your quote was accepted — trip {{reference}} from {{fromCity}} to {{toCity}} is assigned to you.

verified.title: Identity verified
verified.body: Your account is now verified — full trading features are unlocked.

rejected.title: Verification needs attention
rejected.body: Your verification was not approved. Please review and resubmit.

approved.title: Market approved
approved.body: “{{market}}” is now listed — buyers and sellers can attach to it.

approved.title: Listing approved
approved.body: “{{product}}” is now live in the marketplace.

approved.title: You're now a {{role}}
approved.body: Your request to become a {{role}} was approved. Switch roles from the console to get started.

declined.title: Role request declined
declined.body: Your request to become a {{role}} was declined.

assigned_user.title: An agent is now handling your request

resolved.title: Your ticket was resolved — rate your support
